prestazioni: Engine swap to a **K24A2** (2.4L DOHC i-VTEC) from the Acura TSX, paired with a **Hondata KPro V4 ECU** for full standalone tuning, targeting 280+ WHP via a **Garrett GT3071R .63 A/R turbo** on a **Full-Race Motorsports tubular manifold**, with a **Tial MV-R 38mm wastegate** and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise boost mapping (18-22 psi peak).

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **PPG Stage 2+ 6-speed transmission kit** (gear ratios: 2.36, 1.64, 1.26, 1.03, 0.84, 0.68) and a **Spec Stage 3+ Clutch** (multi-disc, 800 lb-ft torque capacity), paired with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** for the rear axle (MR-V EX-specific 4.762 final drive ratio).

Suspension overhaul using **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (MR-V EX-specific valving, 20-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear drop), **SuperPro poly bushings** (full subframe, control arms, and sway bar mounts), and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** to eliminate body roll during high-G cornering on **Advan A052 245/40R18 tires** (mounted on **Enkei PF07 18x9.5 +38 wheels**).
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works MR-V EX widebody kit** (JDM-spec, carbon fiber fenders, custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon hood** and **Voltex Type-5 rear diffuser**), paired with **J's Racing side skirts** and a **custom 3D-printed roof spoiler** (modeled after the NSX-R GT).

**Recaro SP-G (JDM-spec) front seats** with **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub**, and a **custom Mugen-style gauge cluster** (AEM X-Series wideband, oil pressure, and boost gauges in a **Defi Advance BF** pod).

**Full custom paint in Honda Championship White (NH-576M) with **Kansai Hikari Mirror Gloss clear coat**, **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** (custom MR-V EX cutouts), and **Duraflex carbon fiber side mirrors** (color-matched). Interior wrapped in **Nismo Alcantara (black/red)** with **Mugen shift knob** and **Spoon Sports pedals**.
